summary: Tested two new AI endpoints (GET /api/ai/profile-review, POST /api/ai/reply-next-steps) and frontend components (RecruitmentScore.js on ProfilePage, AI Next Steps modal on ResponseTrackerPage). All 19 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified with screenshots.

minor.issue: Intermittent 500 'Could not parse AI response' — AI occasionally returns non-JSON. Observed once in ~5 calls. Retry logic would help but is not critical.

critical_code_review_comments: Profile-review makes multiple separate LLM calls per pytest test run — consider caching results for repeated test calls
ai.py router file is growing (371 lines) — consider splitting into separate files per feature when adding more endpoints
seed_data_creation: Created test user (test-ai-user-99999), session (test_session_ai_99999 in user_sessions collection), minimal profile, tracked college (Duke University 69d01b37c173431d960c3838) with sent+received emails in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new AI features fully working. Test session: test_session_ai_99999 (user_sessions collection). Profile review shows score gauge, grade, strengths, improvements, top actions, response insights, checklist toggle — all verified. AI Next Steps modal shows urgency (REPLY WITHIN 24 HOURS), numbered steps, what-to-avoid, UK player tip — all verified. Minor intermittent AI JSON parse error on profile-review (~1/5 calls) — not blocking.
